title: bufonia perennis subsp. perennis
intro: Bufonia perennis subsp. perennis, also known as a species of the genus Bufonia, is a plant that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bufonia perennis subsp. perennis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
